name: Zulip for Open Source
description: Zulip Cloud Standard is free for open-source projects, providing organized team chat with topics, full message history, and powerful integrations.

perks.title: Free Zulip Cloud Standard
perks.description: Full Zulip Cloud Standard hosting at no cost for open-source projects.

perks.title: Complete Message History
perks.description: Access your organization's entire message history with full-text search.

perks.title: Public Access Option
perks.description: Anyone can view, browse, and search your organization's public content without an account.

perks.title: Integrations
perks.description: Native integrations for GitHub, Jira, Sentry, and hundreds of other tools.

applicationProcess: Request sponsorship through the Zulip sponsorship page.
